---
title: "The Rev. William Williamson"
---

## The Rev. William Williamson

**Dates:** (1804-1875)

### Description

Rector of Datchworth, uncle of Ann Carter Smith

### Biography

He was educated at Westminster and Clare College, Cambridge, 2nd Wrangler, Fellow of Clare 1827-50, barrister 1830-39, ordained 1841; he married  (1850) Jane Ferguson;  he was Rector of Datchworth 1849-74. [<i>Alumni Cantabrigienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
